case_title: JOHN CALDER VS. ROBERT GRAHAM et al

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-11-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
CASE REMOVED FROM PENDING TRIAL DE NOVO CALENDAR IF OBJECTION: HEARING SET FOR SEP-18-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 610 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JAN-21-2014 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 206
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR MAY-05-2014 VACATED. A DISMISSAL WAS FILED ON 4/10/14. (206)
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT GRAHAM, ROBERT HEARING SET FOR SEP-11-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ROBERT GRAHAM'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. MOVING PARTY DID NOT TIMELY FILE THE DEMURRER PER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 1005(B). MOVING PARTY DID NOT FILE PROOF OF SERVICE PER CALIFORNIA RULE OF COURT 3.1300(C). (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.
ORDER ON DEMURRER (OVERRULED)
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR RENEE WELZE LIVINGSTON.

DISCOVERY 302, NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT ROBERT GRAHAM'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INGTERROGATORIES SET 1 AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED, FOR REASONS SET FORTH IN THE MOVING PAPERS AND THE MOTION IS UNOPPOSED. PLAINTIFF JOHN CALDER IS ORDERED TO RESPOND TO THE FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE, WITHOUT OBJECTION, WITHIN 20 DAYS OF HEARING ON THIS MOTION. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $310.00. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE THE ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM: KATHERINE HUIBONHOA, CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA; NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Otion To Compel Responses To Form Ingterrogatories Set 1 And For Monetary Sanctions;
Off Calendar May-22-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

DEFENDANT ROBERT GRAHAM'S Motion To Compel Responses To Form Ingterrogatories Set 1 And For Monetary Sanctions is Granted, for reasons set forth in the moving papers and the motion is unopposed. Plaintiff John Calder is ordered to respond to the Form Interrogatories, Set One, without objection, within 20 days of hearing on this motion. Defendant's request for sanctions is granted in the amount of $310.00. The prevailing party is to prepare the order. Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Huibonhoa, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Not reported. =(302/JPT)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-11-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ROBERT GRAHAM'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Overruled. Moving party did not timely file the demurrer per Code of Civil Procedure section 1005(b). Moving party did not file proof of service per California Rule of Court 3.1300(c). (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
